description: A SPOT-5 satellite photograph (2.5 m resolution, 1/2/3 band combination), dated 2011-05-07 (CNES 2011©, Distribution Airbus DS/Spot Image), depicts the tail of a hydropower lake on the Euphrates river near Kasaba, Turkey. The image shows a light green or muddy-coloured water body contained within a valley with steep, rocky, brownish slopes. A dam structure is visible at the far end of the lake. A red dashed line is manually annotated along the visible shoreline, precisely delineating the current water level against the land. This delineation method is used to define the limits of water bodies, specifically for dams, barrages, and lakes of hydropower stations, with guidelines referencing the water level visible in the 2012 image for such delineations.
